school_address.streetAddress: Gadakhor Basti Village, Sector 43, Faridabad, Haryana 121003, India

reviews.author: Mridul Jindal
reviews.review_body: I was a student in this school for more than 10 years, completed my 12 class from this itself. Being a science student you get sorted into different batches in order of the performance in the exams. If you are lucky enough to get into the top batches you get the privileged to be taught by some expert faculties. Let's not talk about the other case. Also I think the school can emphasize more on its sports facilities.

reviews.author: PRADEEP RANGA
reviews.review_body:
(Translated by Google) Route number 44
Your driver drives the bus in a very dirty manner and if you try to convince him, he tries to throw you under the bus.

Applause should be for such drivers.

(Original)
Rout number 44
आपका चालक बहुत ही गन्दे तरीके से बस चलाता है और अगर इसको समझाने जाओ तो बस के नीचे दे कर मारने की कोशिश करता है ऐसे चालकों के लिए बहुत बहुत धन्यवाद जो बच्चों की जान को जोखिम में डाल कर बस चलाए

तालियां होनी चाहिए ऐसे चालकों के लिए🙏🙏

reviews.school_name: Modern Vidya Niketan Aravali Hills - Sector 43
reviews.author: Ravkirat Gulati
reviews.review_body: This is one of the Best Schools of Faridabad under the MVN Education Society and the best choice if you want to excel in your Board Exams and Various Entrance Examinations, Moreover this school has a good infrastructure and provides various facilities like sports,arts,yoga and other co-curricular activities.
